creator: Karl.Dietz@frankfurt.netsurf.de
text:
changes:
		added symlinking to PLIST (instead of storing the symlink
		  as regular file)
		change symlinking in Makefile to overwrite stale symlink
		change install to use ports INSTALL_* targets
		moved creation of config file to build target (from install)
		  to make reviewing before installing easier
		took over maintainance (suggested by maintainer)

How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/misc/proxyer
	make
	vi work/proxyper313-freebsd-x86/proxyper.ini
	grep INSTALL Makefile
